reason: Terminator 2 features high-stakes cyborg warfare and memorable action set-pieces.
True Lies blends spy thrills with sleek 90s action thrills.
Speed is a quintessential 90s action-thriller known for its nonstop tension.
Die Hard with a Vengeance delivers urban cat-and-mouse thrills and inventive action.
Face/Off is a 90s action-suspense ride driven by identity-twist thrills.
Bad Boys is a buddy-cop 90s action staple with sharp pacing.
GoldenEye rejuvenated the 90s spy-action genre with gritty realism.
Under Siege delivers a steel-clad action thriller aboard a battleship.
Under Siege 2 ups the ante with high-tension train action sequences.
Hard Target features street-smart martial arts action in a modern 90s setting.
